narration_text: Now we'll see how computer networks play a vital role in our daily lives, from simple communication to complex data exchange. Notice that networks are all around us, from the internet we use to access information, to the local networks in our homes and offices. Let's think about this together, considering how networks enable devices to communicate with each other, much like how we use roads to travel between cities. I want you to focus on the concept of interconnected devices, as this is the foundation of computer networks. As we delve into this introductory course, we'll explore the basics of computer networks, and by the end of it, we'll have a solid understanding of how they function, which will prepare us to dive into the specifics of network architecture and protocols in the next section.
